assets.name: lecture_03_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Contains the key angular-momentum counting result: 2L+1 states and M ranges for each L.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Shows the degeneracy statement tied to [H, L]=0, useful for linking symmetry to equal-energy magnetic sublevels.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Shows the centrifugal-barrier discussion for forbidden origin access and the special l=0 case; useful board reference for radial effective potential.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_04.png
assets.rationale: Captures the substitution of L^2 by l(l+1) and its appearance in the 1/r^2 term of the radial equation.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_05.png
assets.rationale: Contains the angular-momentum-based energy-level organization sketch with separate radial equations per l.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_06.png
assets.rationale: Shows the original Schrödinger operator form and decomposition p^2 = p_x^2+p_y^2+p_z^2 before angular separation.
